name: rejoinbi-platform
description: Operate Rejoin BI tenants, full admin configuration, workspaces, uploads, BI projects, ECharts publishing, and safe production cleanup from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Develop and publish Rejoin BI dashboards.
interface.longDescription: Helps Codex connect to Rejoin BI tenants, list workspaces, validate protected workspaces, upload app files, publish BI/ECharts projects, automate platform/admin configuration including users, pages, RLS, messaging, Cloudflare, Codex keys, system, upload gateway, and Data Engine, and safely preview workspace/page cleanup using the platform API. Before any other action, validate a full tenant host and confirm authentication/permission.
defaultPrompt: Map and automate Rejoin BI platform configuration
Preview deleting this Rejoin BI workspace
